title: Machine Design
description: Custom physical apparatus designed for maximum durability and precision.
extendedDescription: In a deployed environment, this service encompasses full architectural integration, ensuring minimal latency between nodes and guaranteed mechanical synergy. Our engineering team custom-tailors each implementation strictly according to payload specifications.
sysNote: This module integrates seamlessly into the core Nexus infrastructure. Additional configuration metrics can be discussed via uplink.

title: Robotics Integration
description: Seamless handoffs between 3rd-party robotic arms and central controllers.
extendedDescription: We bridge foreign automation software with centralized logic cores. This guarantees that your third-party robotic arms communicate synchronously with our proprietary machinery, drastically reducing error variance.
sysNote: Requires initial safety protocol handshake. Calibration typically completes within 4 cycles.

title: AI Systems
description: Self-optimizing predictive maintenance and operational intelligence.
extendedDescription: Our AI models feed directly off edge-sensor data, dynamically shifting logic loops on the fly. This prevents physical breakdowns before they happen by detecting microscopic anomalies in torque and temperature.
sysNote: Machine-learning models are updated bi-weekly through the secure Nexus uplink channel.

title: System Logic
description: Advanced programming of PLCs and microcontrollers for real-time monitoring.
extendedDescription: Raw electrical engineering meets optimized code geometry. We write lean, low-level logic structures to handle thousands of IO points simultaneously without dropping a single packet of instruction data.
sysNote: All PLCs are hot-swappable during execution phase via the redundancy pipeline.
